meta.title: Screen Studio — Beautiful Screen Recordings in Minutes
meta.description: Screen Studio is a macOS screen recorder with automatic zoom and smooth animations for product demos, tutorials, and social media videos.

footer.tagline: Beautiful screen recordings in minutes, right on your Mac.

home.heroSubtitle: A macOS screen recorder with automatic zoom and smooth animations for product demos, tutorials, and social media videos.
home.featuresTitle: Everything you need for a polished recording
home.featuresSubtitle: No editing experience required. Screen Studio handles the hard parts automatically.
home.feature1Description: Screen Studio automatically zooms and pans to follow your cursor, so every click and keystroke is easy to see.
home.feature2Description: Clicks ripple, movements glide. Your cursor looks intentional and polished without any manual editing.
home.feature3Description: Record your camera and microphone alongside your screen, then reposition and resize the overlay after the fact.
home.feature4Description: One-click exports tuned for the web, social media, and 4K 60fps — no manual encoder settings required.
home.feature5Description: Automatically display the shortcuts you press, so tutorials are easy to follow without extra narration.
home.feature6Description: Generate a transcript of your recording entirely on your Mac — audio never leaves your machine.
home.testimonial1Quote: This completely changed how our team records product demos. It looks professional with almost no editing.
home.testimonial2Quote: The automatic zoom alone saves me hours per week. I used to do this by hand in a video editor.
home.testimonial3Quote: Our onboarding tutorials went from amateur to polished overnight. Customers actually finish watching them now.
home.ctaTitle: Ready to make your recordings look great?
home.ctaSubtitle: Download Screen Studio for macOS and start recording in minutes.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start for free. Upgrade whenever you need higher-quality exports and webcam recording.
pricing.upgradeNote: Upgrading requires the desktop app — sign in from Settings, then complete checkout securely through Paddle.
pricing.faq1Q: Do I need an account to use the Free plan?
pricing.faq1A: No — Screen Studio works fully offline without an account. You only need to sign in when upgrading to Pro.
pricing.faq2A: Open Screen Studio, sign in from Settings, then choose "Upgrade to Pro" — checkout happens securely through Paddle inside the app.
pricing.faq3A: Yes. Manage or cancel your subscription anytime from the Account panel in the app.

download.title: Download Screen Studio
download.subtitle: Available for macOS on Apple Silicon (M1 and later).
download.comingSoon: Build coming soon — check back shortly, or watch the changelog for release announcements.
download.requirement3: Screen Recording & Accessibility permissions (requested on first launch)

help.title: Help & FAQ
help.subtitlePrefix: Answers to common questions. Can't find what you need?
help.gs1A: Open the Screen Studio controls window, choose Screen or Window as your source, then click Start. A 3-second countdown gives you time to get ready.
help.gs2Q: Screen Studio isn't recording — what's wrong?
help.gs2A: Check System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording, and make sure Screen Studio is enabled. You'll need to restart the app after granting permission.
help.gs3Q: Can I record just one window instead of the whole screen?
help.gs3A: Yes — switch to the Window tab in the recording controls and pick any open window. The recording will be cropped to exactly that window.
help.ed1Q: Does Screen Studio add zoom automatically?
help.ed1A: Yes. Zoom events are generated automatically based on your cursor movement and clicks, and you can fine-tune or add your own from the editor timeline.
help.ed2Q: Can I add a webcam overlay after recording?
help.ed2A: If you recorded with your webcam enabled, you can reposition, resize, and choose the shape of the overlay at any point in the editor — no need to re-record.
help.ed3Q: How does the transcript feature work?
help.ed3A: Transcripts are generated entirely on your Mac using Apple's on-device Speech framework — your audio is never uploaded anywhere. You can click any word to jump to that moment, or delete filler words in one click.
help.ex1A: You can export as MP4 or GIF, choose from resolution and codec presets (including 4K 60fps on Pro), and pick an aspect ratio suited for web, social, or vertical video.
help.ex2Q: Can I publish directly from the app?
help.ex2A: Yes — Screen Studio can publish your export directly to connected destinations like YouTube, Google Drive, or Dropbox from the export dialog.
help.ac1Q: Do I need an account to use Screen Studio?
help.ac1A: No. Screen Studio works fully offline for recording and editing. An account is only needed if you upgrade to Pro.
help.ac2Q: How do I manage or cancel my subscription?
help.ac2A: Open the Account panel from the toolbar (profile icon), then use "Manage billing" to open your subscription settings.

checkout.successBody: Your Screen Studio Pro subscription is now active.
checkout.successHint: Return to the Screen Studio app — your Pro plan will appear within a few seconds (reopen Settings if needed).
